# ui.sidebar { #app.ui.sidebar }

`ui.sidebar`

Sidebar navigation controls and reactive inputs for model tabs.

Dynamically extracts validated species catalog definitions to construct 
consistent dashboard filtering sidebars across distinct framework versions.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [sidebar](#app.ui.sidebar.sidebar) | Initialize the standardized filtering sidebar layout for bird model views. |

### sidebar { #app.ui.sidebar.sidebar }

```python
ui.sidebar.sidebar(model_version)
```

Initialize the standardized filtering sidebar layout for bird model views.

Populates a core dropdown selection input using verified English common names 
sourced directly from active species metadata collections.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name          | Type   | Description                                                                                        | Default    |
|---------------|--------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| model_version | str    | The version string identifier ('v4' or 'v5') used to namespace  the reactive interface components. | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type    | Description                                                        |
|--------|---------|--------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | Sidebar | The configured layout panel object containing the filter controls. |
